# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: User File Upload Manager
 * Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents on a membership site.
 * Version: 1.0.0
 * Author: Custom Developer
 * Text Domain: user-file-upload-manager
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class User_File_Upload_Manager {

    private $upload_dir;
    private $upload_url;
    private $allowed_mime_types;
    private $max_file_size;

    public function __construct() {
        $wp_upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $this->upload_dir = $wp_upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files/';
        $this->upload_url = $wp_upload_dir['baseurl'] . '/user-files/';
        $this->max_file_size = 10 * 1024 * 1024; // 10MB

        $this->allowed_mime_types = array(
            'jpg'  => 'image/jpeg',
            'jpeg' => 'image/jpeg',
            'png'  => 'image/png',
            'gif'  => 'image/gif',
            'webp' => 'image/webp',
            'bmp'  => 'image/bmp',
            'pdf'  => 'application/pdf',
            'doc'  => 'application/msword',
            'docx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'xls'  => 'application/vnd.ms-excel',
            'xlsx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
            'txt'  => 'text/plain',
            'rtf'  => 'application/rtf',
            'odt'  => 'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text',
            'ods'  => 'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.spreadsheet',
        );

        add_action('init', array($this, 'create_upload_directory'));
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_admin_menu'));
        add_action('admin_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_admin_styles'));
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_frontend_styles'));
        add_shortcode('user_file_upload', array($this, 'render_upload_form_shortcode'));
        add_shortcode('user_files_list', array($this, 'render_user_files_list_shortcode'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_ufum_delete_file', array($this, 'ajax_delete_file'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_ufum_set_profile_picture', array($this, 'ajax_set_profile_picture'));
        add_action('show_user_profile', array($this, 'show_user_profile_fields'));
        add_action('edit_user_profile', array($this, 'show_user_profile_fields'));
        add_action('personal_options_update', array($this, 'save_user_profile_fields'));
        add_action('edit_user_profile_update', array($this, 'save_user_profile_fields'));
        add_filter('get_avatar', array($this, 'custom_avatar'), 10, 6);
        add_filter('get_avatar_url', array($this, 'custom_avatar_url'), 10, 3);

        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'activate'));
        register_deactivation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'deactivate'));
    }

    public function activate() {
        $this->create_upload_directory();
        $this->create_database_table();
    }

    public function deactivate() {
        // Cleanup if needed
    }

    public function create_upload_directory() {
        if (!file_exists($this->upload_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($this->upload_dir);
        }

        $htaccess_file = $this->upload_dir . '.htaccess';
        if (!file_exists($htaccess_file)) {
            $htaccess_content = "Options -Indexes\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "<FilesMatch '\.(php|phtml|php3|php4|php5|php7|phps|cgi|pl|asp|aspx|shtml|shtm|fcgi|fpl|jsp|htm|html|wml)$'>\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "Order Allow,Deny\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "Deny from all\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "</FilesMatch>\n";
            file_put_contents($htaccess_file, $htaccess_content);
        }

        $index_file = $this->upload_dir . 'index.php';
        if (!file_exists($index_file)) {
            file_put_contents($index_file, '<?php // Silence is golden.');
        }
    }

    public function create_database_table() {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();

        $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS $table_name (
            id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            user_id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL,
            file_name varchar(255) NOT NULL,
            original_name varchar(255) NOT NULL,
            file_path varchar(500) NOT NULL,
            file_url varchar(500) NOT NULL,
            file_type varchar(100) NOT NULL,
            file_size bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            file_category varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'document',
            description text DEFAULT NULL,
            is_profile_picture tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            uploaded_at datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            KEY user_id (user_id),
            KEY file_category (file_category),
            KEY is_profile_picture (is_profile_picture)
        ) $charset_collate;";

        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql);
    }

    public function enqueue_admin_styles($hook) {
        if (strpos($hook, 'user-file-upload') === false && $hook !== 'profile.php' && $hook !== 'user-edit.php') {
            return;
        }
        wp_enqueue_style('ufum-admin-style', false);
        wp_add_inline_style('ufum-admin-style', $this->get_admin_css());
        wp_enqueue_script('ufum-admin-script', false);
        wp_add_inline_script('ufum-admin-script', $this->get_admin_js());
    }

    public function enqueue_frontend_styles() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return;
        }
        wp_enqueue_style('ufum-frontend-style', false);
        wp_add_inline_style('ufum-frontend-style', $this->get_frontend_css());
        wp_enqueue_script('jquery');
        wp_localize_script('jquery', 'ufum_ajax', array(
            'ajax_url' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
            'nonce'    => wp_create_nonce('ufum_ajax_nonce'),
        ));
    }

    public function add_admin_menu() {
        add_menu_page(
            __('User File Uploads', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            __('User Files', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            'manage_options',
            'user-file-upload-manager',
            array($this, 'render_admin_page'),
            'dashicons-media-document',
            30
        );

        add_submenu_page(
            'user-file-upload-manager',
            __('All Files', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            __('All Files', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            'manage_options',
            'user-file-upload-manager',
            array($this, 'render_admin_page')
        );

        add_submenu_page(
            'user-file-upload-manager',
            __('Settings', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            __('Settings', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            'manage_options',
            'user-file-upload-settings',
            array($this, 'render_settings_page')
        );
    }

    public function handle_file_upload($user_id = null, $file_category = 'document', $description = '') {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return new WP_Error('not_logged_in', __('You must be logged in to upload files.', 'user-file-upload-manager'));
        }

        if ($user_id === null) {
            $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        }

        if (!current_user_can('manage_options') && (int) $user_id !== get_current_user_id()) {
            return new WP_Error('permission_denied', __('You do not have permission to upload files for this user.', 'user-file-upload-manager'));
        }

        if (!isset($_FILES['ufum_file']) || $_FILES['ufum_file']['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $error_message = $this->get_upload_error_message(isset($_FILES['ufum_file']) ? $_FILES['ufum_file']['error'] : UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE);
            return new WP_Error('upload_error', $error_message);
        }

        $file = $_FILES['ufum_file'];

        // Validate file size
        if ($file['size'] > $this->max_file_size) {
            return new WP_Error('file_too_large', sprintf(
                __('File size exceeds the maximum allowed size of %s MB.', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
                $this->max_file_size / (1024 * 1024)
            ));
        }

        if ($file['size'] === 0) {
            return new WP_Error('empty_file', __('The uploaded file is empty.', 'user-file-upload-manager'));
        }

        // Validate MIME type
        $finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $detected_mime = finfo_file($finfo, $file['tmp_name']);
        finfo_close($finfo);

        if (!in_array($detected_mime, $this->allowed_mime_types, true)) {
            return new WP_Error('invalid_file_type', __('This file type is not allowed. Allowed types: images (JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, BMP), PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX, TXT, RTF, ODT, ODS.', 'user-file-upload-manager'));
        }

        // Validate file extension
        $file_extension = strtolower(pathinfo($file['name'], PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
        if (!array_key_exists($file_extension, $this->allowed_mime_types)) {
            return new WP_Error('invalid_extension', __('This file extension is not allowed.', 'user-file-upload-manager'));
        }

        // Check for double extensions
        $name_without_ext = pathinfo($file['name'], PATHINFO_FILENAME);
        if (preg_match('/\.(php|phtml|asp|aspx|jsp|cgi|pl|exe|bat|cmd|sh|com)/i', $name_without_ext)) {
            return new WP_Error('suspicious_filename', __('The filename contains a suspicious extension.', 'user-file-upload-manager'));
        }

        // Create user-specific directory
        $user_dir = $this->upload_dir . $user_id . '/';
        if (!file_exists($user_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_dir);
            file_put_contents($user_dir . 'index.php', '<?php // Silence is golden.');
        }

        // Sanitize filename and generate unique name
        $sanitized_name = sanitize_file_name($file['name']);
        $unique_name = wp_unique_filename($user_dir, $sanitized_name);
        $destination = $user_dir . $unique_name;

        // Move uploaded file
        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            return new WP_Error('move_failed', __('Failed to save the uploaded file.', 'user-file-upload-manager'));
        }

        // Set proper file permissions
        chmod($destination, 0644);

        // Save to database
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';

        $file_url = $this->upload_url . $user_id . '/' . $unique_name;

        // If it's a profile picture, unset previous profile pictures
        $is_profile_picture = ($file_category === 'profile_picture') ? 1 : 0;
        if ($is_profile_picture) {
            $wpdb->update(
                $table_name,
                array('is_profile_picture' => 0),
                array('user_id' => $user_id, 'is_profile_picture' => 1),
                array('%d'),
                array('%d', '%d')
            );
            update_user_meta($user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_url', $file_url);
        }

        $inserted = $wpdb->insert(
            $table_name,
            array(
                'user_id'            => $user_id,
                'file_name'          => $unique_name,
                'original_name'      => $sanitized_name,
                'file_path'          => $destination,
                'file_url'           => $file_url,
                'file_type'          => $detected_mime,
                'file_size'          => $file['size'],
                'file_category'      => sanitize_text_field($file_category),
                'description'        => sanitize_textarea_field($description),
                'is_profile_picture' => $is_profile_picture,
                'uploaded_at'        => current_time('mysql'),
            ),
            array('%d', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%d', '%s', '%s', '%d', '%s')
        );

        if (!$inserted) {
            @unlink($destination);
            return new WP_Error('db_error', __('Failed to save file information to the database.', 'user-file-upload-manager'));
        }

        return array(
            'id'            => $wpdb->insert_id,
            'file_name'     => $unique_name,
            'original_name' => $sanitized_name,
            'file_url'      => $file_url,
            'file_type'     => $detected_mime,
            'file_size'     => $file['size'],
            'file_category' => $file_category,
        );
    }

    public function get_user_files($user_id, $category = null, $limit = -1, $offset = 0) {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';

        $query = "SELECT * FROM $table_name WHERE user_id = %d";
        $params = array($user_id);

        if ($category !== null) {
            $query .= " AND file_category = %s";
            $params[] = $category;
        }

        $query .= " ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC";

        if ($limit > 0) {
            $query .= " LIMIT %d OFFSET %d";
            $params[] = $limit;
            $params[] = $offset;
        }

        return $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare($query, $params));
    }

    public function get_all_files($limit = 50, $offset = 0, $search = '', $category = '') {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';

        $query = "SELECT f.*, u.display_name, u.user_email FROM $table_name f LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->users} u ON f.user_id = u.ID WHERE 1=1";
        $params = array();

        if (!empty($search)) {
            $query .= " AND (f.original_name LIKE %s OR u.display_name LIKE %s OR u.user_email LIKE %s)";
            $search_term = '%' . $wpdb->esc_like($search) . '%';
            $params[] = $search_term;
            $params[] = $search_term;
            $params[] = $search_term;
        }

        if (!empty($category)) {
            $query .= " AND f.file_category = %s";
            $params[] = $category;
        }

        $query .= " ORDER BY f.uploaded_at DESC LIMIT %d OFFSET %d";
        $params[] = $limit;
        $params[] = $offset;

        if (!empty($params)) {
            return $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare($query, $params));
        }

        return $wpdb->get_results($query);
    }

    public function get_total_files_count($search = '', $category = '') {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';

        $query = "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $table_name f LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->users} u ON f.user_id = u.ID WHERE 1=1";
        $params = array();

        if (!empty($search)) {
            $query .= " AND (f.original_name LIKE %s OR u.display_name LIKE %s OR u.user_email LIKE %s)";
            $search_term = '%' . $wpdb->esc_like($search) . '%';
            $params[] = $search_term;
            $params[] = $search_term;
            $params[] = $search_term;
        }

        if (!empty($category)) {
            $query .= " AND f.file_category = %s";
            $params[] = $category;
        }

        if (!empty($params)) {
            return (int) $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare($query, $params));
        }

        return (int) $wpdb->get_var($query);
    }

    public function delete_file($file_id, $user_id = null) {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';

        $where = array('id' => $file_id);
        if ($user_id !== null && !current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            $where['user_id'] = $user_id;
        }

        $file = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM $table_name WHERE id = %d",
            $file_id
        ));

        if (!$file) {
            return new WP_Error('not_found', __('File not found.', 'user-file-upload-manager'));
        }

        if (!current_user_can('manage_options') && (int) $file->user_id !== get_current_user_id()) {
            return new WP_Error('permission_denied', __('You do not have permission to delete this file.', 'user-file-upload-manager'));
        }

        // Delete physical file
        if (file_exists($file->file_path)) {
            @unlink($file->file_path);
        }

        // If it was the profile picture, remove the user meta
        if ($file->is_profile_picture) {
            delete_user_meta($file->user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_url');
        }

        // Delete from database
        $deleted = $wpdb->delete($table_name, array('id' => $file_id), array('%d'));

        if ($deleted === false) {
            return new WP_Error('db_error', __('Failed to delete file record from database.', 'user-file-upload-manager'));
        }

        return true;
    }

    public function ajax_delete_file() {
        check_ajax_referer('ufum_ajax_nonce', 'nonce');

        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('You must be logged in.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        $file_id = isset($_POST['file_id']) ? absint($_POST['file_id']) : 0;
        if (!$file_id) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('Invalid file ID.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        $result = $this->delete_file($file_id, get_current_user_id());

        if (is_wp_error($result)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => $result->get_error_message()));
        }

        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => __('File deleted successfully.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
    }

    public function ajax_set_profile_picture() {
        check_ajax_referer('ufum_ajax_nonce', 'nonce');

        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('You must be logged in.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        $file_id = isset($_POST['file_id']) ? absint($_POST['file_id']) : 0;
        if (!$file_id) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('Invalid file ID.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();

        $file = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM $table_name WHERE id = %d AND user_id = %d",
            $file_id,
            $user_id
        ));

        if (!$file) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('File not found.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        if (strpos($file->file_type, 'image/') !== 0) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('Only image files can be set as profile pictures.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
        }

        // Unset all previous profile pictures for this user
        $wpdb->update(
            $table_name,
            array('is_profile_picture' => 0),
            array('user_id' => $user_id, 'is_profile_picture' => 1),
            array('%d'),
            array('%d', '%d')
        );

        // Set the new profile picture
        $wpdb->update(
            $table_name,
            array('is_profile_picture' => 1, 'file_category' => 'profile_picture'),
            array('id' => $file_id),
            array('%d', '%s'),
            array('%d')
        );

        update_user_meta($user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_url', $file->file_url);

        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => __('Profile picture updated successfully.', 'user-file-upload-manager')));
    }

    public function custom_avatar($avatar, $id_or_email, $size, $default, $alt, $args = array()) {
        $user_id = null;

        if (is_numeric($id_or_email)) {
            $user_id = (int) $id_or_email;
        } elseif (is_object($id_or_email)) {
            if (!empty($id_or_email->user_id)) {
                $user_id = (int) $id_or_email->user_id;
            } elseif (!empty($id_or_email->ID)) {
                $user_id = (int) $id_or_email->ID;
            }
        } elseif (is_string($id_or_email)) {
            $user = get_user_by('email', $id_or_email);
            if ($user) {
                $user_id = $user->ID;
            }
        }

        if ($user_id) {
            $profile_picture_url = get_user_meta($user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_url', true);
            if (!empty($profile_picture_url)) {
                $avatar = sprintf(
                    '<img alt="%s" src="%s" class="avatar avatar-%d photo" height="%d" width="%d" loading="lazy" />',
                    esc_attr($alt),
                    esc_url($profile_picture_url),
                    (int) $size,
                    (int) $size,
                    (int) $size
                );
            }
        }

        return $avatar;
    }

    public function custom_avatar_url($url, $id_or_email, $args) {
        $user_id = null;

        if (is_numeric($id_or_email)) {
            $user_id = (int) $id_or_email;
        } elseif (is_object($id_or_email) && !empty($id_or_email->user_id)) {
            $user_id = (int) $id_or_email->user_id;
        } elseif (is_string($id_or_email)) {
            $user = get_user_by('email', $id_or_email);
            if ($user) {
                $user_id = $user->ID;
            }
        }

        if ($user_id) {
            $profile_picture_url = get_user_meta($user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_url', true);
            if (!empty($profile_picture_url)) {
                return $profile_picture_url;
            }
        }

        return $url;
    }

    public function show_user_profile_fields($user) {
        $profile_picture_url = get_user_meta($user->ID, 'ufum_profile_picture_url', true);
        ?>
        <h3><?php _e('Custom Profile Picture', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></h3>
        <table class="form-table">
            <tr>
                <th><label><?php _e('Current Profile Picture', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></label></th>
                <td>
                    <?php if (!empty($profile_picture_url)): ?>
                        <img src="<?php echo esc_url($profile_picture_url); ?>" style="max-width: 150px; max-height: 150px; border-radius: 50%;" />
                        <br>
                        <label>
                            <input type="checkbox" name="ufum_remove_profile_picture" value="1" />
                            <?php _e('Remove profile picture', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?>
                        </label>
                    <?php else: ?>
                        <p><?php _e('No custom profile picture set. Upload one from the front-end upload form.', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></p>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </td>
            </tr>
        </table>
        <?php
    }

    public function save_user_profile_fields($user_id) {
        if (!current_user_can('edit_user', $user_id)) {
            return;
        }

        if (isset($_POST['ufum_remove_profile_picture']) && $_POST['ufum_remove_profile_picture'] == '1') {
            delete_user_meta($user_id, 'ufum_profile_picture_url');

            global $wpdb;
            $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';
            $wpdb->update(
                $table_name,
                array('is_profile_picture' => 0),
                array('user_id' => $user_id, 'is_profile_picture' => 1),
                array('%d'),
                array('%d', '%d')
            );
        }
    }

    public function render_upload_form_shortcode($atts) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<div class="ufum-notice ufum-notice-error">' . __('Please log in to upload files.', 'user-file-upload-manager') . '</div>';
        }

        $atts = shortcode_atts(array(
            'category'    => '',
            'title'       => __('Upload File', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            'show_list'   => 'yes',
            'max_display' => 20,
        ), $atts, 'user_file_upload');

        $message = '';
        $message_type = '';

        // Handle form submission
        if (isset($_POST['ufum_upload_submit']) && wp_verify_nonce($_POST['ufum_upload_nonce'], 'ufum_upload_action')) {
            $category = !empty($_POST['ufum_category']) ? sanitize_text_field($_POST['ufum_category']) : 'document';
            $description = !empty($_POST['ufum_description']) ? sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['ufum_description']) : '';

            $result = $this->handle_file_upload(get_current_user_id(), $category, $description);

            if (is_wp_error($result)) {
                $message = $result->get_error_message();
                $message_type = 'error';
            } else {
                $message = __('File uploaded successfully!', 'user-file-upload-manager');
                $message_type = 'success';
            }
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $files = $this->get_user_files($user_id, null, (int) $atts['max_display']);

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="ufum-container">
            <?php if (!empty($atts['title'])): ?>
                <h3 class="ufum-title"><?php echo esc_html($atts['title']); ?></h3>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <?php if (!empty($message)): ?>
                <div class="ufum-notice ufum-notice-<?php echo esc_attr($message_type); ?>">
                    <?php echo esc_html($message); ?>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" class="ufum-upload-form">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('ufum_upload_action', 'ufum_upload_nonce'); ?>

                <div class="ufum-form-group">
                    <label for="ufum_file" class="ufum-label"><?php _e('Select File', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?> <span class="required">*</span></label>
                    <input type="file" name="ufum_file" id="ufum_file" class="ufum-file-input" required />
                    <p class="ufum-help-text"><?php printf(
                        __('Allowed types: Images, PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX, TXT, RTF, ODT, ODS. Max size: %s MB.', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
                        $this->max_file_size / (1024 * 1024)
                    ); ?></p>
                </div>

                <?php if (empty($atts['category'])): ?>
                <div class="ufum-form-group">
                    <label for="ufum_category" class="ufum-label"><?php _e('File Category', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></label>
                    <select name="ufum_category" id="ufum_category" class="ufum-select">
                        <option value="profile_picture"><?php _e('Profile Picture', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                        <option value="document" selected><?php _e('Document', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                        <option value="id_document"><?php _e('ID Document', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                        <option value="certificate"><?php _e('Certificate', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                        <option value="other"><?php _e('Other', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <?php else: ?>
                    <input type="hidden" name="ufum_category" value="<?php echo esc_attr($atts['category']); ?>" />
                <?php endif; ?>

                <div class="ufum-form-group">
                    <label for="ufum_description" class="ufum-label"><?php _e('Description (optional)', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></label>
                    <textarea name="ufum_description" id="ufum_description" class="ufum-textarea" rows="3" placeholder="<?php esc_attr_e('Add a description for this file...', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?>"></textarea>
                </div>

                <div class="ufum-form-group">
                    <button type="submit" name="ufum_upload_submit" class="ufum-button ufum-button-primary">
                        <?php _e('Upload File', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </form>

            <?php if ($atts['show_list'] === 'yes' && !empty($files)): ?>
            <div class="ufum-files-section">
                <h4 class="ufum-subtitle"><?php _e('Your Uploaded Files', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></h4>
                <div class="ufum-files-grid">
                    <?php foreach ($files as $file): ?>
                    <div class="ufum-file-card" id="ufum-file-<?php echo esc_attr($file->id); ?>">
                        <div class="ufum-file-preview">
                            <?php if (strpos($file->file_type, 'image/') === 0): ?>
                                <img src="<?php echo esc_url($file->file_url); ?>" alt="<?php echo esc_attr($file->original_name); ?>" class="ufum-file-thumb" />
                            <?php else: ?>
                                <div class="ufum-file-icon">
                                    <?php echo $this->get_file_icon($file->file_type); ?>
                                </div>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                            <?php if ($file->is_profile_picture): ?>
                                <span class="ufum-badge ufum-badge-profile"><?php _e('Profile Pic', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></span>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                        </div>
                        <div class="ufum-file-info">
                            <p class="ufum-file-name" title="<?php echo esc_attr($file->original_name); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($file->original_name); ?></p>
                            <p class="ufum-file-meta">
                                <span class="ufum-file-size"><?php echo size_format($file->file_size); ?></span>
                                <span class="ufum-file-date"><?php echo date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($file->uploaded_at)); ?></span>
                            </p>
                            <span class="ufum-file-category-label"><?php echo esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $file->file_category))); ?></span>
                            <?php if (!empty($file->description)): ?>
                                <p class="ufum-file-description"><?php echo esc_html($file->description); ?></p>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                        </div>
                        <div class="ufum-file-actions">
                            <a href="<?php echo esc_url($file->file_url); ?>" target="_blank" class="ufum-button ufum-button-small ufum-button-secondary"><?php _e('View', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></a>
                            <?php if (strpos($file->file_type, 'image/') === 0 && !$file->is_profile_picture): ?>
                                <button type="button" class="ufum-button ufum-button-small ufum-button-success ufum-set-profile-pic" data-file-id="<?php echo esc_attr($file->id); ?>"><?php _e('Set as Profile Pic', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></button>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                            <button type="button" class="ufum-button ufum-button-small ufum-button-danger ufum-delete-file" data-file-id="<?php echo esc_attr($file->id); ?>"><?php _e('Delete', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>

        <script type="text/javascript">
        jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
            $('.ufum-delete-file').on('click', function() {
                if (!confirm('<?php echo esc_js(__('Are you sure you want to delete this file?', 'user-file-upload-manager')); ?>')) {
                    return;
                }
                var fileId = $(this).data('file-id');
                var $card = $('#ufum-file-' + fileId);
                $.ajax({
                    url: '<?php echo admin_url('admin-ajax.php'); ?>',
                    type: 'POST',
                    data: {
                        action: 'ufum_delete_file',
                        file_id: fileId,
                        nonce: '<?php echo wp_create_nonce('ufum_ajax_nonce'); ?>'
                    },
                    success: function(response) {
                        if (response.success) {
                            $card.fadeOut(300, function() { $(this).remove(); });
                        } else {
                            alert(response.data.message);
                        }
                    },
                    error: function() {
                        alert('<?php echo esc_js(__('An error occurred. Please try again.', 'user-file-upload-manager')); ?>');
                    }
                });
            });

            $('.ufum-set-profile-pic').on('click', function() {
                var fileId = $(this).data('file-id');
                var $btn = $(this);
                $.ajax({
                    url: '<?php echo admin_url('admin-ajax.php'); ?>',
                    type: 'POST',
                    data: {
                        action: 'ufum_set_profile_picture',
                        file_id: fileId,
                        nonce: '<?php echo wp_create_nonce('ufum_ajax_nonce'); ?>'
                    },
                    success: function(response) {
                        if (response.success) {
                            location.reload();
                        } else {
                            alert(response.data.message);
                        }
                    },
                    error: function() {
                        alert('<?php echo esc_js(__('An error occurred. Please try again.', 'user-file-upload-manager')); ?>');
                    }
                });
            });
        });
        </script>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    public function render_user_files_list_shortcode($atts) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<div class="ufum-notice ufum-notice-error">' . __('Please log in to view your files.', 'user-file-upload-manager') . '</div>';
        }

        $atts = shortcode_atts(array(
            'category' => '',
            'limit'    => 50,
        ), $atts, 'user_files_list');

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $category = !empty($atts['category']) ? $atts['category'] : null;
        $files = $this->get_user_files($user_id, $category, (int) $atts['limit']);

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="ufum-container">
            <?php if (empty($files)): ?>
                <p class="ufum-no-files"><?php _e('You have not uploaded any files yet.', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></p>
            <?php else: ?>
                <table class="ufum-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th><?php _e('File', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                            <th><?php _e('Category', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                            <th><?php _e('Size', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                            <th><?php _e('Date', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                            <th><?php _e('Actions', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        <?php foreach ($files as $file): ?>
                        <tr id="ufum-row-<?php echo esc_attr($file->id); ?>">
                            <td>
                                <?php if (strpos($file->file_type, 'image/') === 0): ?>
                                    <img src="<?php echo esc_url($file->file_url); ?>" alt="" style="max-width: 40px; max-height: 40px; vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 8px; border-radius: 4px;" />
                                <?php endif; ?>
                                <?php echo esc_html($file->original_name); ?>
                                <?php if ($file->is_profile_picture): ?>
                                    <span class="ufum-badge ufum-badge-profile"><?php _e('Profile', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></span>
                                <?php endif; ?>
                            </td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $file->file_category))); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo size_format($file->file_size); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($file->uploaded_at)); ?></td>
                            <td>
                                <a href="<?php echo esc_url($file->file_url); ?>" target="_blank"><?php _e('View', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></a>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    public function render_admin_page() {
        // Handle delete action
        if (isset($_GET['action']) && $_GET['action'] === 'delete' && isset($_GET['file_id'])) {
            if (wp_verify_nonce($_GET['_wpnonce'], 'ufum_admin_delete_' . $_GET['file_id'])) {
                $result = $this->delete_file(absint($_GET['file_id']));
                if (is_wp_error($result)) {
                    $admin_message = $result->get_error_message();
                    $admin_message_type = 'error';
                } else {
                    $admin_message = __('File deleted successfully.', 'user-file-upload-manager');
                    $admin_message_type = 'success';
                }
            }
        }

        $search = isset($_GET['s']) ? sanitize_text_field($_GET['s']) : '';
        $category_filter = isset($_GET['category']) ? sanitize_text_field($_GET['category']) : '';
        $per_page = 20;
        $current_page = isset($_GET['paged']) ? max(1, absint($_GET['paged'])) : 1;
        $offset = ($current_page - 1) * $per_page;

        $total_files = $this->get_total_files_count($search, $category_filter);
        $files = $this->get_all_files($per_page, $offset, $search, $category_filter);
        $total_pages = ceil($total_files / $per_page);
        ?>
        <div class="wrap">
            <h1><?php _e('User Uploaded Files', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></h1>

            <?php if (isset($admin_message)): ?>
                <div class="notice notice-<?php echo esc_attr($admin_message_type); ?> is-dismissible">
                    <p><?php echo esc_html($admin_message); ?></p>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <div class="ufum-admin-stats">
                <div class="ufum-stat-box">
                    <strong><?php echo number_format_i18n($total_files); ?></strong>
                    <span><?php _e('Total Files', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <form method="get" class="ufum-admin-filters">
                <input type="hidden" name="page" value="user-file-upload-manager" />
                <input type="text" name="s" value="<?php echo esc_attr($search); ?>" placeholder="<?php esc_attr_e('Search files or users...', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?>" class="regular-text" />
                <select name="category">
                    <option value=""><?php _e('All Categories', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                    <option value="profile_picture" <?php selected($category_filter, 'profile_picture'); ?>><?php _e('Profile Picture', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                    <option value="document" <?php selected($category_filter, 'document'); ?>><?php _e('Document', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                    <option value="id_document" <?php selected($category_filter, 'id_document'); ?>><?php _e('ID Document', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                    <option value="certificate" <?php selected($category_filter, 'certificate'); ?>><?php _e('Certificate', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                    <option value="other" <?php selected($category_filter, 'other'); ?>><?php _e('Other', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></option>
                </select>
                <button type="submit" class="button"><?php _e('Filter', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></button>
            </form>

            <?php if (empty($files)): ?>
                <p><?php _e('No files found.', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></p>
            <?php else: ?>
                <table class="wp-list-table widefat fixed striped">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th style="width: 50px;"><?php _e('ID', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                            <th><?php _e('Preview', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                            <th><?php _e('File Name', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                            <th><?php _e('User', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                            <th><?php _e('Category', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                            <th><?php _e('Type', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                            <th><?php _e('Size', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                            <th><?php _e('Description', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                            <th><?php _e('Date', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                            <th><?php _e('Actions', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        <?php foreach ($files as $file): ?>
                        <tr>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($file->id); ?></td>
                            <td>
                                <?php if (strpos($file->file_type, 'image/') === 0): ?>
                                    <img src="<?php echo esc_url($file->file_url); ?>" style="max-width: 50px; max-height: 50px; border-radius: 4px;" />
                                <?php else: ?>
                                    <?php echo $this->get_file_icon($file->file_type); ?>
                                <?php endif; ?>
                                <?php if ($file->is_profile_picture): ?>
                                    <br><span class="dashicons dashicons-admin-users" title="<?php esc_attr_e('Profile Picture', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?>"></span>
                                <?php endif; ?>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <strong><?php echo esc_html($file->original_name); ?></strong>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <?php if (!empty($file->display_name)): ?>
                                    <a href="<?php echo esc_url(get_edit_user_link($file->user_id)); ?>">
                                        <?php echo esc_html($file->display_name); ?>
                                    </a>
                                    <br><small><?php echo esc_html($file->user_email); ?></small>
                                <?php else: ?>
                                    <em><?php _e('Deleted User', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></em> (ID: <?php echo esc_html($file->user_id); ?>)
                                <?php endif; ?>
                            </td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $file->file_category))); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo esc_html($file->file_type); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo size_format($file->file_size); ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo !empty($file->description) ? esc_html(wp_trim_words($file->description, 10)) : '—'; ?></td>
                            <td><?php echo date_i18n(get_option('date_format') . ' ' . get_option('time_format'), strtotime($file->uploaded_at)); ?></td>
                            <td>
                                <a href="<?php echo esc_url($file->file_url); ?>" target="_blank" class="button button-small"><?php _e('View', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></a>
                                <a href="<?php echo wp_nonce_url(
                                    add_query_arg(array(
                                        'page'    => 'user-file-upload-manager',
                                        'action'  => 'delete',
                                        'file_id' => $file->id,
                                    ), admin_url('admin.php')),
                                    'ufum_admin_delete_' . $file->id
                                ); ?>" class="button button-small" style="color: #a00;" onclick="return confirm('<?php echo esc_js(__('Are you sure you want to delete this file?', 'user-file-upload-manager')); ?>');"><?php _e('Delete', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></a>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </tbody>
                </table>

                <?php if ($total_pages > 1): ?>
                <div class="tablenav bottom">
                    <div class="tablenav-pages">
                        <?php
                        echo paginate_links(array(
                            'base'      => add_query_arg('paged', '%#%'),
                            'format'    => '',
                            'prev_text' => __('&laquo; Previous', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
                            'next_text' => __('Next &raquo;', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
                            'total'     => $total_pages,
                            'current'   => $current_page,
                        ));
                        ?>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <?php endif; ?>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
    }

    public function render_settings_page() {
        if (isset($_POST['ufum_save_settings']) && wp_verify_nonce($_POST['ufum_settings_nonce'], 'ufum_save_settings_action')) {
            update_option('ufum_max_file_size', absint($_POST['ufum_max_file_size']));
            echo '<div class="notice notice-success is-dismissible"><p>' . __('Settings saved.', 'user-file-upload-manager') . '</p></div>';
        }

        $max_file_size_mb = get_option('ufum_max_file_size', 10);
        ?>
        <div class="wrap">
            <h1><?php _e('User File Upload Settings', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></h1>

            <form method="post">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('ufum_save_settings_action', 'ufum_settings_nonce'); ?>

                <table class="form-table">
                    <tr>
                        <th scope="row"><label for="ufum_max_file_size"><?php _e('Max File Size (MB)', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></label></th>
                        <td>
                            <input type="number" name="ufum_max_file_size" id="ufum_max_file_size" value="<?php echo esc_attr($max_file_size_mb); ?>" min="1" max="100" class="small-text" />
                            <p class="description"><?php printf(
                                __('Server upload limit: %s. PHP post_max_size: %s.', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
                                ini_get('upload_max_filesize'),
                                ini_get('post_max_size')
                            ); ?></p>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <th scope="row"><?php _e('Upload Directory', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                        <td>
                            <code><?php echo esc_html($this->upload_dir); ?></code>
                            <?php if (is_dir($this->upload_dir) && is_writable($this->upload_dir)): ?>
                                <span style="color: green;">✓ <?php _e('Writable', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></span>
                            <?php else: ?>
                                <span style="color: red;">✗ <?php _e('Not writable or does not exist', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></span>
                            <?php endif; ?>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <th scope="row"><?php _e('Allowed File Types', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                        <td>
                            <p><?php echo implode(', ', array_map('strtoupper', array_keys($this->allowed_mime_types))); ?></p>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <th scope="row"><?php _e('Shortcodes', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></th>
                        <td>
                            <p><code>[user_file_upload]</code> — <?php _e('Displays the upload form with file list.', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></p>
                            <p><code>[user_file_upload category="profile_picture" title="Upload Profile Picture" show_list="no"]</code></p>
                            <p><code>[user_files_list]</code> — <?php _e('Displays user\'s uploaded files in a table.', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?></p>
                            <p><code>[user_files_list category="document" limit="10"]</code></p>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                </table>

                <p class="submit">
                    <input type="submit" name="ufum_save_settings" class="button button-primary" value="<?php esc_attr_e('Save Settings', 'user-file-upload-manager'); ?>" />
                </p>
            </form>
        </div>
        <?php
    }

    private function get_file_icon($mime_type) {
        $icons = array(
            'application/pdf' => '📄',
            'application/msword' => '📝',
            'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document' => '📝',
            'application/vnd.ms-excel' => '📊',
            'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet' => '📊',
            'text/plain' => '📃',
            'application/rtf' => '📝',
            'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text' => '📝',
            'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.spreadsheet' => '📊',
        );

        return isset($icons[$mime_type]) ? '<span style="font-size: 2em;">' . $icons[$mime_type] . '</span>' : '<span style="font-size: 2em;">📁</span>';
    }

    private function get_upload_error_message($error_code) {
        $messages = array(
            UPLOAD_ERR_INI_SIZE   => __('The uploaded file exceeds the server upload limit.', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_FORM_SIZE  => __('The uploaded file exceeds the form size limit.', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_PARTIAL    => __('The uploaded file was only partially uploaded.', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE    => __('No file was uploaded. Please select a file.', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_NO_TMP_DIR => __('Missing a temporary folder on the server.', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_CANT_WRITE => __('Failed to write file to disk.', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_EXTENSION  => __('A PHP extension stopped the file upload.', 'user-file-upload-manager'),
        );

        return isset($messages[$error_code]) ? $messages[$error_code] : __('Unknown upload error occurred.', 'user-file-upload-manager');
    }

    private function get_frontend_css() {
        return '
        .ufum-container {
            max-width: 900px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 20px;
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen-Sans, Ubuntu, Cantarell, "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif;
        }
        .ufum-title {
            font-size: 1.5em;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding-bottom: 10px;
            border-bottom: 2px solid #0073aa;
            color: #23282d;
        }
        .ufum-subtitle {
            font-size: 1.2em;
            margin: 30px 0 15px;
            color: #23282d;
        }
        .ufum-notice {
            padding: 12px 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            border-left: 4px solid;
        }
        .ufum-notice-success {
            background: #ecf7ed;
            border-color: #46b450;
            color: #2e7d32;
        }
        .ufum-notice-error {
            background: #fbeaea;
            border-color: #dc3232;
            color: #c62828;
        }
        .ufum-upload-form {
            background: #f9f9f9;
            padding: 25px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        }
        .ufum-form-group {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }
        .ufum-form-group:last-child {
            margin-bottom: 0;
        }
        .ufum-label {
            display: block;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            color: #23282d;
        }
        .ufum-label .required {
            color: #dc3232;
        }
        .ufum-file-input,
        .ufum-select,
        .ufum-textarea {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 8px 12px;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 14px;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        .ufum-file-input:focus,
        .ufum-select:focus,
        .ufum-textarea:focus {
            border-color: #0073aa;
            outline: none;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #0073aa;
        }
        .ufum-help-text {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #666;
            margin-top: 4px;
        }
        .ufum-button {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 10px 20px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: background 0.2s;
        }
        .ufum-button-primary {
            background: #0073aa;
            color: #fff;
        }
        .ufum-button-primary:hover {
            background: #005a87;
        }
        .ufum-button-secondary {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            color: #23282d;
            border: 1px solid #ddd;
        }
        .ufum-button-secondary:hover {
            background: #e0e0e0;
            color: #23282d;
            text-decoration: none;
        }
        .ufum-button-success {
            background: #46b450;
            color: #fff;
        }
        .ufum-button-success:hover {
            background: #3a9a42;
        }
        .ufum-button-danger {
            background
